case_title: ASHIRVADAM RAYIKANTI VS. ELECTROLUX HOME PRODUCTS, INC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-02-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ELECTROLUX HOME PRODUCTS, INC.
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAYIKANTI, ASHIRVADAM AS TO DEFENDANT ELECTROLUX HOME PRODUCTS, INC.
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OR DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANNE WONG; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,248.00 FILED BY RAYIKANTI, ASHIRVADAM AS TO DEFENDANT ELECTROLUX HOME PRODUCTS, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-17-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: DISMISSED W/O PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
